channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-16 18:13 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: AI will achieve Stockfish-level coding and generalized computer use
item.description: AI will achieve Stockfish-level coding and generalized computer use

item.title: @elonmusk: We're excited to join forces with@SpaceXto advance the frontier of useful AI. Expect significant imp...
item.description: We're excited to join forces with@SpaceXto advance the frontier of useful AI. Expect significant improvements to Cursor soon.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 BREAKING: Acting AG Blanche and FBI Director Patel announce a grand jury has INDICTED leftist NGO ...
item.description: 🚨 BREAKING: Acting AG Blanche and FBI Director Patel announce a grand jury has INDICTED leftist NGO Southern Poverty Law Center on 11 COUNTS This is MASSIVE! SPLC said they were "fighting white supremacy," but they were "MANUFACTURING the extremism it purports to expose" by PAYING sources to "stoke racial hatred," per Acting AG Blanche Best part? They've been charged in the Middle District of Alabama! They're SCREWED! 🔥 SPLC has been hit with SIX counts of wirefraud, four counts of bank fraud, and one count of conspiracy to commit money laundering.

item.title: @elonmusk: Lots to do together. Excited to be joining forces with@SpaceXto build useful AI.
item.description: Lots to do together. Excited to be joining forces with@SpaceXto build useful AI.

item.title: @elonmusk: Stockfish is the world's strongest chess engine (Elo ~3650). It dominates grandmasters like they're ...
item.description: Stockfish is the world's strongest chess engine (Elo ~3650). It dominates grandmasters like they're beginners. "Stockfish-level coding" means AI that programs at that same superhuman tier: writing, debugging, optimizing, and architecting complex code with elite speed, correctness, and scale — far beyond even the best human devs. Tireless genius coder mode.

item.title: @elonmusk: Mission: Expanding the Scope and Scale of Consciousness. From my 📸 of the billboard on Times Square ...
item.description: Mission: Expanding the Scope and Scale of Consciousness. From my 📸 of the billboard on Times Square “This is, depending on how you read it, either the most ridiculous thing a serious company has ever put on its mission page or the most honest. We think it’s the latter.” —@a16z

item.title: @elonmusk: It is humbling to consider that if we harness just 1 millionth of the Sun’s power for AI, that will ...
item.description: It is humbling to consider that if we harness just 1 millionth of the Sun’s power for AI, that will be much more than a million times the intelligence of all of humanity

item.title: @elonmusk: NEWS: Two years ago, an internal document from the Center for Countering Digital Hate listed "K*ll M...
item.description: NEWS: Two years ago, an internal document from the Center for Countering Digital Hate listed "K*ll Musk's Twitter" and "Trigger EU & UK regulatory action" as annual priorities. CCDH was co-founded by Morgan McSweeney, who later became UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Chief of Staff. This week, Starmer threatened to remove X's right to self regulate. UK regulator Ofcom opened a formal investigation into X over Grok. Ofcom can fine X up to 10% of its worldwide revenue or block X in the UK entirely. Starmer also announced this week a UK ban on under 16s using social media including X by spring 2027. The 2024 documents were published by journalists Paul Thacker and Matt Taibbi.

item.title: @elonmusk: Another fun/insane anecdote from the peak-woke era was when an employee of ours tried to get our ter...
item.description: Another fun/insane anecdote from the peak-woke era was when an employee of ours tried to get our terms of service amended such that any organization disliked by the SPLC would be banned from using our software. What a racket. All of it.

item.title: @elonmusk: The politicians who turned a blind eye to the Rape of Britain must go to prison
item.description: The politicians who turned a blind eye to the Rape of Britain must go to prison

item.title: @elonmusk: Censorship always comes with a “protect the children” lie
item.description: Censorship always comes with a “protect the children” lie

item.title: @elonmusk: This actually happened and still happens
item.description: This actually happened and still happens

item.title: @elonmusk: Those who knew must go to prison for a long time
item.description: Those who knew must go to prison for a long time

item.title: @elonmusk: The politicians imprison people to hide their crimes
item.description: The politicians imprison people to hide their crimes

item.title: @elonmusk: Make our Sun sentient to understand the Universe and extend the light of consciousness to the stars
item.description: Make our Sun sentient to understand the Universe and extend the light of consciousness to the stars
